Our Services

Complete solutions in paralegal advisory and bureaucratic services to keep your company always legally compliant

License Issuance

Municipal, state, and federal licenses for businesses of all segments. We ensure compliance with all legal requirements with agility.

Operating License

Obtaining and renewing municipal permits for the regular operation of your business.

Building Permit

Complete documentation for construction and renovations, including project approval.

Environmental Licenses

LP, LI, and LO with the competent environmental agencies for your activity.

AVCB - Fire Department

Complete Inspection Report, including necessary project and adjustments.

Municipal Registrations

Registrations and enrollments necessary for regular operation with municipal agencies, ensuring fiscal and operational compliance.

Municipal Registration

Company registration at the city hall for issuing invoices and collecting ISS.

Business IPTU

Regularization and monitoring of IPTU for commercial properties.

ISS - Registration

Registration and regularization for the collection of the Service Tax.

Specific Registrations

Special registrations according to activity: sanitary surveillance, environment, etc.

Corporate Acts

Registration of contract amendments, corporate changes, and other business acts with total legal security.

Contract Amendment

Modifications in the articles of association: address, activities, administration.

Change of Partners

Entry, exit, and transfer of shares with all necessary documentation.

Capital Increase

Formalization of increases in share capital and its full payment.

Dissolution

Regular closure of companies with de-registration in all agencies.

Commercial Registry

Complete services with Commercial Registries for full business regularization and maintenance of legal compliance.

Company Registration

Incorporation of companies of all corporate types.

Book Registration

Opening and closing of corporate and fiscal books.

Branch Opening

Registration of branches, subsidiaries, and secondary establishments.

Certificates

Issuance of simplified, specific, and full-content certificates.

Filings

Filing of minutes, balance sheets, and other mandatory documents.

Notary Services

Documentation and registrations in notary offices for legal validation of business acts and compliance with legal obligations.

Signature Authentication

Authentication of signatures on business documents.

Authentication

Authenticated copies of documents for administrative processes.

Powers of Attorney

Drafting and registration of public business powers of attorney.

Business Consulting

Specialized guidance for the regularization and maintenance of business documentation, ensuring compliance and legal security.

Document Analysis

Complete diagnosis of the company's legal and documentary situation.

Planning

Strategies for regularization and optimization of processes.

Compliance

Implementation of legal and regulatory compliance policies.

Training

Team training on legal processes and obligations.

Consulting Benefits

Reduction of legal risks and fines
Optimized and faster processes
Time and resource savings
Legal security in operations
Continuous specialized support
Compliance with legislation

Frequently Asked Questions

The timeframe varies by license type and responsible agency. On average, municipal licenses take 15 to 30 days, while environmental licenses can take 60 to 120 days. Our team works to maximize speed.

Yes! We serve from individual entrepreneurs to large economic groups. Our specialization allows us to offer scalable and personalized solutions for each client profile.

You'll have access to our client area where you can track the status of all your processes in real-time. Additionally, we send updates via email and WhatsApp whenever there's movement.

Yes! We have an express service for urgent demands, with prioritization and dedicated tracking. Contact us to check availability for your specific case.

Need any of these services?

Contact us and receive a personalized quote. Our team is ready to meet your needs with agility and efficiency.

Request Quote Chat on WhatsApp
SINAL VERDE ASSESSORIA

Specialists in paralegal advisory and bureaucratic services. Over 15 years streamlining Brazilian businesses with excellence and agility.
